evidence: Agent now depends on AgentSessionTransport and exports routerBridgeTransport, localCliBridgeTransport, and sandboxSdkTransport adapters.
providerOptions is sanitized for protected keys; typed ChatOptions.sandbox carries agentProfile/sessionId.
TCloudClient.fromCliBridge marks direct clients; client.bridge() now uses direct model wire format and maps resume to session_id.
workspace.dir is no longer appended to the prompt and is passed to transport start; router/local bridge transports still cannot enforce mounts without bridge/runtime support.
Agent forces non-streaming when budget.usd is set so usage accounting can run.
Tool-call AgentEvent variants were removed from the public union until the upstream bridge/runtime protocol exposes stable tool parts.
TCloud exposes sandbox() for Sandbox SDK access and tcloud-agent can run against sandboxSdkTransport, router bridge, or local cli-bridge.
The providerOptions test now asserts protected field overrides are rejected, and typed sandbox serialization is covered.
